nodes.name: Manual Trigger (dev)
nodes.notes: Manual trigger for local testing only. In production, prefer the Cron trigger.

nodes.name: Weekly Schedule (prod)
nodes.notes: Runs every Monday at 08:00 server time. Adjust schedule in n8n UI for client-specific needs.

assignments.name: highlights
assignments.value: Closed a key client in SaaS vertical; shipped v1 of feature

assignments.value: 5 new leads, 2 opps to proposal stage, 1 deal closed

assignments.name: marketing

assignments.name: product_tech

nodes.name: Call Local LLM
nodes.notes: Calls the local LLM endpoint. Production template includes timeout/retry settings and an error output connected to the failure-alert path.

nodes.name: Extract Report
nodes.notes: Normalises common local/OpenAI-compatible response shapes into report. Unexpected response shapes flow to the failure-alert path.

nodes.name: Preview / Save Report
nodes.notes: Creates a previewable report payload. In production, replace or extend this with file storage, database insert, Google Drive, Notion, or Slack.

nodes.name: Validate Inputs / Guardrails
nodes.notes: Stops empty or low-quality weekly input data before the workflow spends LLM time or sends a weak report.

nodes.name: Log Audit Snapshot (demo)
nodes.notes: Demo audit checkpoint. For client production, replace or extend with database, Google Drive, Notion, filesystem, or logging platform storage.

nodes.name: Optional Human Approval Gate (demo)
nodes.notes: Pass-through demo approval gate. Replace with n8n Wait/Form/Slack approval before sending reports to senior leadership or external recipients.

nodes.name: Prepare Failure Alert
nodes.notes: Builds an alert payload when the LLM call fails or the response cannot be extracted. Replace the next demo node with Slack, email, PagerDuty, etc.

nodes.name: Failure Alert Output (demo)
nodes.notes: Demo alert output. In production, replace or extend with Slack, email, PagerDuty, Opsgenie, or incident-management integration.
